WeightMethod.description: Elicitation method recorded in a Weight Provenance Record (Methodology §6).
WeightMethod.title: WeightMethod

dispersion.description: Recorded dispersion across the panel (e.g. 'IQR 0.04', 'CR 0.07', 'κ_w 0.81') — the spread that the stability interval (§7) is drawn from.
dispersion.title: Dispersion

review_due.description: When this weight is next reviewed (§6 publication).
review_due.title: Review Due

set_by.description: Who set the weight (panel id or named expert).
set_by.title: Set By
